Welcome aboard, [[name]]! 
We're excited to have you as a new [[company]] customer. 
Your account is all set up and ready to go.

Here's a quick overview:

Portal: [[url]]

Your temporary password is  [[Password]] (please change this on your first login)

Need help? Reach out to our support team at anytime.

We're here to ensure you have an amazing experience with our services. Let us know how we can best support you.

Welcome to the [[company]] family!
